## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] Manual test in local environment

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (English-only, stdlib-first)
- [ ] I have added/updated tests for new or changed functionality
- [ ] All existing and new tests pass
- [ ] I have updated the README if public API or configuration changed
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have checked for and handled all edge cases
